productDisplayName: Nike Men White Bull Logo Cap
description: Style Note The Rafael Nadal Bull logo cap by nike combines Grand Slam good looks with the progressive performance of Dri-Fit fabric for supreme breathability and perspiration management. This Nike cap is an ideal choice as a cool sportswear accessory and a classy leisurewear option.   Product Details White cap made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology Polyester circular knit mesh panels on the crown to control moisture Velcro strap to adjust fit made of Dri-Fit 90% Polyester, 10% Spandex terry Bull logo embroidered on the front Curved visor with black piping and embroidered Nike swoosh Material and Care 100% polyester  Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners or bleach Tumble dry on low Cool iron Do not iron on design Do not dry clean
